nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Hornacote was born in 1214, in Hartland, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Gervais Hornacote. She had at least 1 son with Sir Geoffrey Dinham. She died in 1302, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Hornacote est née en 1214, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Gervais Hornacote. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Geoffrey Dinham. Elle est décédée en 1302, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Hornacoteは1214年にイギリスイギリスデボンハートランドでGervais Hornacoteの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Geoffrey Dinhamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1302年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Hornacote(은)는 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하틀랜드에서 Gervais Hornacote의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Geoffrey Dinham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Hornacote родилась в 1214 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Gervais Hornacote. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Geoffrey Dinham. Она умерла в 1302 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.
